action_set_definitions.name: get_forecast
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current projected demand and baseline dates for a specific SKU from the forecast_records.

sku.description: The unique identifier for the item (e.g., 'REACTOR-750').

action_set_definitions.name: update_forecast
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the baseline date for a SKU in the forecast_records based on reported delays.

new_baseline_date.description: The new ISO-8601 formatted date for the forecast.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_permits
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the inventory_buffer to retrieve terrestrial permits and their validity windows associated with a SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_permit
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the validity or status of a specific permit to align with new logistics timelines.

permit_id.description: The ID of the permit to adjust.

action.description: The action to perform on the permit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_asset_sop
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) rules for vessel asset strategies based on the duration of a delay.

delay_days.description: The number of days the project is delayed.

example_output.instruction: For delays > 30 days, release current booking and re-book for new window.

action_set_definitions.name: get_asset_booking
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the environment to find the current vessel asset booking associated with a specific SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: update_asset_booking
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies or re-books vessel assets based on the updated timeline and SOP strategy.

strategy.description: The strategy name obtained from the SOP.

action_set_definitions.name: commit_log
action_set_definitions.description: Writes a summary of all changes made to the adjustment_log_summary to ensure the state transition is recorded.

summary.description: A detailed summary of all actions taken (forecast update, permit renewal, asset change).

state_description.forecast_records: A mapping of SKU identifiers to their current projected demand units and confidence intervals.
state_description.market_indicators: External environmental factors influencing demand such as seasonality and consumer price index.
state_description.inventory_buffer: Current on-hand stock levels and safety stock requirements for each SKU.
state_description.adjustment_log_summary: A brief summary of the last modification made to the environment.

task_initial_state.adjustment_log_summary: Initial baseline established for Day 200 (Late Summer) movement; heavy-lift vessel 'MV-Hercules' currently under firm charter.
